Bouncy Castle Rentals in Grand Falls NB

Grand Falls is a bilingual New Brunswick community on the Saint John River, known for the impressive Grand Falls Gorge and its hydro-electric history. Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Grand Falls NB is a bilingual town known for the spectacular Grand Falls gorge on the Saint John River, approximately 410 km from Bridgewater. We consider selected larger events in New Brunswick by availability and quote. Contact us with your event details and we will let you know whether your date and location work for our schedule.

Grand Falls NB is approximately 410 km from our Bridgewater base. New Brunswick bookings are for selected larger events only. Travel costs, accommodation requirements if applicable, availability, and all logistics are confirmed by quote before any commitment.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Dino Combo - Combo Inflatable, $279, Dry-use - Dinosaur-themed combo inflatable with bounce and slide fun.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you deliver inflatable rentals to Grand Falls NB?
Grand Falls NB is approximately 410 km from our Bridgewater base. We accept selected larger NB events by availability and quote. Contact us with your event details.
How do I confirm my booking?
Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. We review availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit requirements, then send you confirmation details. Your booking is only confirmed once a deposit is received.
What is the wind limit for inflatables?
Our rental agreement requires inflatables to be taken down or not set up if sustained winds reach 38 km/h or higher. Safety is the priority and we monitor conditions on your event day.
What deposit is required?
A deposit is required to hold your date. The deposit amount and payment method (e-Transfer is preferred) are confirmed when we send your booking details.
What events are popular for inflatable rentals in Grand Falls NB?
In Grand Falls NB we most commonly supply inflatables and party packages for backyard birthday parties, school fun days, community festivals, and summer outdoor events. Tell us your event type and we'll recommend the right setup.
